item.title: Spotlight On: Key takeaways from AAD 2026
item.description: FirstWord highlights the latest updates emerging from AAD in psoriasis, atopic dermatitis, HS, and more…

item.title: Spotlight On: ACC highlights cardiometabolic expansion across mechanisms and markets
item.description: This year's meeting of the American College of Cardiology (ACC) painted a picture of a cardiometabolic space that is both expanding and fragmenting.

item.title: KOL Views Preview: Sequence vs "shock & awe" – is AstraZeneca's quad viable in 1L HCC?
item.description: FirstWord will be speaking with a leading oncologist about AstraZeneca's top-line EMERALD-3 results, the competitive profile of Imfinzi plus Imjudo, and how the STRIDE regimen added to standard therapy could fit into the HCC algorithm.
